Walter Lippmann was a political journalist and a professor, known for his books on political issues and public opinion. H.P. Lovecraft was a writer, primarily of horror and science fiction stories. Although both wrote books, they were not the same person.

No, Walter Lippmann and H.P. Lovecraft were different authors.
